Interface ICompiledProgram

All Superinterfaces:
Collection<ICompiledInstruction>, Iterable<ICompiledInstruction>, List<ICompiledInstruction>, SequencedCollection<ICompiledInstruction>
All Known Implementing Classes:
ConcreteCompiledProgram
public interface ICompiledProgram extends Iterable<ICompiledInstruction>, List<ICompiledInstruction>
Represents a compiled program consisting of a sequence of compiled instructions.

This interface extends both Iterable and List for convenient iteration and random access.

Since:
1.0.0
Author:
TiJ
